questionHtml:
What is the product of the reaction of propanal with lithium aluminium hydride, LiAlH4?

A.  Propanoic acid

B.  Propanone

C.  Propan-1-ol

D.  Propan-2-ol

meta.title: What is the product of the reaction of propanal with lithium aluminium hydride, LiAlH4? A. Propanoic acid B. Propanone C. Propan-1-ol D. Propan-2-ol
